name: Prompt Chaining
expression_detail: A horizontal sequence of rounded nodes connected by arrows. Each node shows a transformation label (extract → classify → respond). The active node pulses; completed nodes fill solid. Clicking a node shows its input/output.

name: ReAct
expression_detail: Two alternating columns — Thought and Action — with entries appearing as if typed in real time. An Observation row appears after each Action, indented and muted. The loop tightens visually as steps accumulate.

name: Plan-and-Execute
expression_detail: A vertical numbered plan. Each step has a status pill (pending / running / done / replanned). When a step runs it expands to reveal a mini ReAct trace inside. A replanned step shows a strikethrough and a replacement.

name: Tree of Thoughts
expression_detail: A top-down tree that grows as the agent explores. Each branch shows a reasoning snippet and a score badge. Dead-end branches fade and collapse with a strikethrough. The winning path highlights in a distinct color.

name: State Machine
expression_detail: Rounded rectangles for states, labeled arrows for transitions. The current state glows. Hovering a transition shows its trigger condition. Invalid transitions from the current state are dimmed.

name: Tool Use / Function Calling
expression_detail: A card showing a function signature: name, parameter schema (type + description per param), and return type. Below it, a filled-in call card with actual values shows one invocation. A result chip appears after execution.

name: Sandboxed Execution
expression_detail: A bordered box styled like a terminal window. Inside: code in, stdout/stderr out, exit code badge. Outside the box: explicit 'no filesystem', 'no network' denial labels. Box dissolves after run to show teardown.

name: Agentic RAG
expression_detail: A cycle: Query → Retrieve → Evaluate → Refine or Accept. Each iteration the query label mutates. Retrieved chunks appear as cards that are scored; low-score cards are discarded. Loop terminates when the agent marks the result grounded.

name: Citation / Attribution
expression_detail: A paragraph of agent output where factual phrases have superscript [1], [2] badges. Hovering a badge reveals the source snippet in a popover. Unverified claims are underlined in orange with a 'low confidence' label.

name: In-Context Memory
expression_detail: A horizontal tape of message blocks. A visible window frame shows what's in active context. Blocks outside the window are faded. As new tokens arrive, old ones scroll left and dim. A token counter sits at the edge of the frame.

name: Context Distillation
expression_detail: Many message blocks flow into a funnel graphic. Out the other end comes a single dense 'summary' block. An arrow continues from there with the conversation resuming. Before/after token count shows the reduction ratio.

name: Semantic Memory
expression_detail: A profile card rendered as formatted JSON. Fields update in place with a brief flash animation when the agent writes a new fact. A toggle switches between profile model (one card) and collection model (many narrow cards).

name: Episodic Memory
expression_detail: A vertical timeline of past run entries — timestamp, task summary, outcome badge (success / failed / revised). The agent retrieves relevant episodes before acting; retrieved entries highlight. Decayed entries fade at the bottom.

name: Procedural Memory
expression_detail: A system prompt displayed as an editable card. When the agent learns a better procedure, a diff view shows the old line struck through and the new line in green. Version history is accessible via a stepper at the top.

name: External Memory (RAG)
expression_detail: Three fixed stages in sequence: Query → Vector Store (nearest-neighbor result list) → Generate. Chunk cards show similarity scores. No loop — one retrieval pass, then generation. Contrasts with Agentic RAG by being deliberately static.

name: Memory Write Strategies
expression_detail: A single flow that forks at a 'write memory' decision node. The hot path branch continues inline (synchronous, labeled with +latency). The background branch shows a deferred task icon and a dashed arrow indicating async completion.

name: Reflection / Self-Critique
expression_detail: Output feeds back into a 'Critic' prompt that returns a score and a list of issues. If score < threshold, a revised output card appears below the original, connected by a curved arrow. Iteration count badge. Hard cap shown as a stop sign.

name: Evaluator-Optimizer
expression_detail: Generator and Evaluator appear as two distinct agent cards in a dialogue layout. Generator outputs first; Evaluator responds with structured feedback (score + bullet points). Generator's next output shows tracked changes. Roles are visually separate — not self-loop.

name: Debate / Critique
expression_detail: Two agent columns — Proponent and Critic — exchanging labeled rounds. A Judge panel sits below, reading both columns. The judge's verdict card appears after a set number of rounds, quoting from each side.

name: Guardrails
expression_detail: Agent output passes through a validation layer shown as a translucent barrier. Passive mode: rule-check badges appear (pass / warn / block) inline with the output. Active mode: a blocked item triggers a human escalation card with a reason label.

name: Pipeline
expression_detail: Horizontal stages connected by a conveyor arrow: spec → code → tests → review → docs. Each stage is a labeled agent card with an input and output slot. A failed stage turns red and the arrow past it goes dark — pipeline halts.

name: Fan-out / Parallel
expression_detail: One orchestrator node fans out to N worker nodes via simultaneous arrows. Workers run in parallel — a progress bar on each. A reduce node waits at the bottom. Result cards arrive and stack; conflicts are flagged with a merge indicator.

name: Routing / Triage
expression_detail: An input enters a classifier node that emits a category label. Labeled branches extend from the classifier to specialist agents. Only the matching branch activates — others dim. No coordinator logic, just dispatch.

name: Orchestrator + Subagents
expression_detail: Central orchestrator node with spokes to specialist nodes (researcher, coder, tester). Each spoke shows the context slice the orchestrator passed. Results flow back to the hub, which synthesizes them into a final output card.

name: Hierarchical Agent
expression_detail: A tree with 3 tiers: Manager → Supervisors → Workers. Each tier's nodes are color-coded. Context scope badges show how much context each tier holds. Delegation arrows go down; result arrows go up. Summarization loss is shown at each tier boundary.

name: Handoff
expression_detail: A horizontal sequence of specialist agents (Triage → Billing → Tech Support). Between each, a baton graphic carries a 'state packet' label listing what context was transferred. The receiving agent activates; the prior agent dims.

name: Swarm / Decentralized
expression_detail: Many equal-weight agent nodes in a loose cluster. Edges appear and disappear dynamically as agents communicate peer-to-peer. No node is larger or centered. Task completion emerges from the cluster — no single coordinator is highlighted.

name: Event-Driven / Actor Model
expression_detail: Each agent has an inbox queue rendered as a stack of envelope icons. Agents emit events that route to other inboxes — shown as animated envelopes in flight. No blocking; agents process independently. Queue depth and processing rate are visible.

name: Retry with Fallback
expression_detail: A failed tool call enters an error classifier. Transient branch: retry arc with exponential backoff timer badges (1s, 2s, 4s). Structural branch: a fallback strategy card replaces the original call. Dead end is marked if both exhaust.

name: Checkpoint / Approval Gate
expression_detail: Agent execution timeline flows right until it hits a gate graphic (barrier + human icon). Agent state and reasoning surface in a review panel. Approve: barrier lifts, execution resumes with a green stamp. Deny: arrow curves back to a replan node.

name: Confidence-Gated Autonomy
expression_detail: A semicircular gauge showing agent confidence score (0–1). A threshold marker is shown per action type (higher for destructive, lower for reads). Score above threshold: proceed autonomously (green zone). Below: escalate to human (orange zone).

name: Speculative Execution
expression_detail: N parallel agent lanes start simultaneously with different strategy labels. Each has a progress indicator. The first to complete triggers a 'winner' banner; remaining lanes are visibly cancelled with a strikethrough. A merge variant shows all lanes contributing to a final node.

name: Prompt Caching
expression_detail: A prompt broken into labelled segments: system (cached, shown in warm amber), tools definition (cached), user message (uncached, shown cool). Cache hit badges appear on the warm segments. Token cost counter shows reduction from cache hits.

name: Code → Test → Fix Loop
expression_detail: A circular loop: Write → Run Tests → Parse Failures → Patch → Write. Test results appear as a suite grid: red cells for failures with parsed error snippets below. After patch, cells flip to green. Iteration counter at hub. Hard stop shown as a brake.

name: Linter-in-the-Loop
expression_detail: Generated code with squiggly underlines on problem lines. A parsed error card per issue shows: file, line, rule ID, message. An arrow from each card points to the next code block showing the targeted fix. Execution stage is gated until lint passes.

name: Scaffolded Execution
expression_detail: A bordered execution box (container metaphor) surrounds code + runtime. Explicit 'no network', 'no host fs' labels on walls. Stdout/stderr captured and returned as structured observation cards. The box dissolves at run end — teardown is visible.

name: Git-Aware Agent
expression_detail: A git log strip showing the last N commits as context cards: hash, message, author, files changed. The agent's current diff appears as an uncommitted card at the head. Branch indicator and blame attribution visible. Risk level badge derived from recent change velocity.
